Maids just walk in your room which I got caught out with HUMILIATING to say the least also funny smell in the room when u flushed the loo Weired   Breakfast was ok bit like watching piggys get fed tbh

The wardrobe area poorly lit If there were lights in the wardrobe the room would be 10 10  Staff very friendly and helpful Breakfast good quality Room bathroom and seperate toilet very nice Comfy bed I would stay there again without hesitation
Extractor fan in bathroom a little noisy   Excellent food comfortable clean room Staff very attentive and helpful Good location to visit Amsterdam and the Keukenhof gardens
Huge bed Massive windows Bath and Shower Swimming Pool Amazing restaurant food Easy access to bikes from the hotel equally a quick and fun bike ride straight into the centre

It would be nice to have a better hairdryer and extra toiletries such as cotton buds   Staff are very friendly and helpful Breakfast is really good The room was spacious and clean with a choice of two pillows per person

It was out first time in Amsterdam the hotel was just superb Staff were so friendly helpful throughout our stay Hotel was so clean our room was lovely Breakfast was a brilliant selection the food was great It was my fianc s birthday as a special treat the hotel gave us complementary cocktails in the amazing sky bar such a lovely gesture very much appreciated Will definitely be back to stay again have already recommended the hotel to family friends Lisa

On the top of the hotel there is a bar which was very loud from thursday   Breakfast was delicious and sufficient The bed was comfortable Free coffe and tea in the room is very nice from the hotel Before check in and after check out luggage can be stored in a separated room

super comfy beds good coffee and tea facilities in room ice machine in corridor Great sky bar and coffee bar in reception Staff very helpful and friendly The hotel is a little way out of city centre 25 min walk or 5 mins on tram but this is a benefit as you don t get drunken louts disturbing your sleep Only 8 mins on train to Schipol airport
There was nothing I didn t like about my stay Well done to your staff  I found my stay at the hotel was very good I cannot fault my stay I look forward to using you again very soon

Cost of the sauna was extra would have liked it included   Tea and coffee making facilities were available in the room but not advertised in the facilities 30 Euro by taxi from airport in the evening not bad
The fact that I had to leave   The staff are extremely friendly and very helpful The location is great not right in the city but everything is easily accessible via the nearby tram stop

We were recommended this hotel by two separate couples and i m glad we took their advice When you first step into the hotel you re in a very impressive colourful and modern reception with friendly and helpful staff at both the reception and elsewhere in the hotel The food and drinks were delicious and the rooms were tasteful clean and felt very designer The hotel s location is exactly right its about 15 minutes from central station via the tram and I d definitely recommend the tram with their 1 24 or 48 hour passes You get to see a lot more of the city and have a better idea of how to find everything you re looking for

The toilet is french style separated without lavabo and the spacious bathroom has a glass door no frosted and a window overlooking the room It is very inconvenient   The room is very spacious and well decorated with excellent view with nice lighting and coffee tea facilities The breakfast is of very good quality It is located close to Lelylaan train station 8 minutes to the airport

I stayed for 5 days and had 2 breakfasts included in my price I slept in the first 2 days and on the third went for breakfast only to be told Oh you have to use the breakfasts the first 2 mornings That was not told to me when I checked in not to mention a breakfast is a breakfast shouldn t matter what day you use it You are on vacation After arguing for a little while I did finally get my 2 breakfasts but was really annoyed I had to have the argument Especially because I went to the restaurant 2 nights in a row and bought food and drinks and tipped the extremely slow staff The bartender and waitresses were ok Not really friendly and seemed to not understand that they are a waitress n bartender and asking a costumer what they would like And not letting me sit there for 10 minutes until you acknowledge me is not cool   Very nice hotel just a bit outside the city center But very easy to get to by tram It s an 8 minute walk to tram that takes you right to centraal station
The shower didn t work so me and my partner kept having to run baths Also had no air conditioning  The room was very nice and the location was ideal

the location not so great a little far the stuff in reception desk mislead us a few times didn t gave all information or gave the wrong information the stuff was not helpful at all   The hotel is very nice clean the stuff is nice but not professional

The wellness facilities and sky bar look a lot better in pictures I was also disappointed by the distance of the hotel from central   The rooms were really comfortable Staff were really friendly and helpful If you ask at reception they will give you a number for a pizza delivery restaurant that deliver throughout the night So if ever your still up peckish in the night then they are the best people to call for your midnight feast We ordered after 3 am and they came so quickly The hotel is located in a really a peaceful area
Some slight dirt on the headboard of the bed but other than that everything was great   The room was great great bathroom with bath Big bed really lovely Staff were super helpful and it was great
The restaurant was expensive and the food was just normal   Cool Hotel with a very nice design Very clean and comfortable It was a very nice stay Location well connected

The bathroom had a glass door which was a little odd but other than that I couldn t fault it   The staff were helpful and friendly and our room was lovely with full length windows at one end I d definitely stay here again Very convenient for getting in and out of the city quickly too

FAR out of town 25 30 euros for taxi back when trams stop running Pillows are HUGE Very uncomfortable Aircon was RUBBISH The room was very hot and gave us a very bad nights sleep Price you see when you book is 5 which is added on when you arrive Tried to change us for 1x extra breakfast on 2 occasions once at breakfast once when checking out explained it was included in the room rate for 2 people didn t go down well I especially found the staff difficult and didn t want to know when you had a problem Call to reception to ask for toothpaste went down like a lead balloon disappointing for the price we paid Not what I would expect for a 4 hotel   Breakfast was really good hotel pool was nice although not given any dressing gowns slippers and sauna cost 10 euro
Amazing rooms helpful and friendly staff Location is good you can use trams 1 and 17 to get to the centre and the central station We had an amazing stay

Extractor pipe in bathroom and toilet constantly on and loud which was irritating as it could not be switched off but we managed to sleep as we were tired from walking sightseeing not enough channels on TV some English channels would have been nice   Facilities were good location ok staff friendly helpful room clean with big comfy bed
as the hotel isn t in the centre byscicle rental could be free of charge  good breakfast swimming pool indoor nice thematic decoration due to closeness to the World Fashion Centre

Not a fan of the skybar the lighting the music the general vibe was too clubby A more relaxed atmosphere overlooking the city lights would be far more appealing inviting   Bath was fabulous Shower was fabulous Bed was fabulous We were able to check in earlier than expected excellent service given our flight was so early Umbrellas available at door to use as necessary Great idea as its about 4 min walk to tram great on a rainy day

The hotel has pleasant spacious rooms endowed with a practical desk and sufficient wardrobe The bathroom is comfortable and provided with a wide shower cabin The rooms also include a Nespresso machine with complimentary capsules The hotel is slightly peripheral but easily and rapidly connected to the city centre by the tram lines 1 or 17 Overall we feel that the WestCord Fashion Hotel is a convenient choice for travellers wishing to spend a few days in Amsterdam at a reasonable price while at the same time enjoying the comfort of a first class modern establishment

I thought the breakfast was very expensive we were charged full price at 10 45am there was no fresh food made while we were there and not much selection for the continental breakfast this was disappointing   The hotel was really nice and comfortable

Room wasn t as big as it looked on the photos Breakfast was okay but was NOT worth 38 euros for two that appeared on my check out invoice seriously disappointed that price was not advised when we were sat down Found the whole stay at the hotel very expensive in general as the room was nearly 300 euros for two nights and it was very secluded away from wherever you need to be   Skyy bar was a very cool atmosphere that could be enjoyed by any age 18 very clean room hotel was very secure room was nice

The room wasn t clean enough the shower kept leaking on to the floor so couldn t enjoy a shower without worrying about that the hairdryer in the bathroom the room service charges and prices 20 for a toasted sandwich and to be deliveried No vending machines in the hotel was the worst part Also I was messaged the hotel back and fort before my trip about partner birthday they told me they would give complentarty slippers and bathrobes in room waiting but when we arrived they werent there I had to ring and ask also they told me they would give me and my partner for his birthday free cocktail each for sky bar and a happy birthday message which we were never given Wasn t too happy about that The bathrobes were appalling also like hard rough towels made into it Cheap not comfortable   The pool the view from our room

I thought it was poor that you had to pay 5 for delivery charge on room service lighting in the rooms could of been better it was just a bit dull in there that s just being a bit picky   Brilliant sized bed how secure the property was location of the hotel was easy to get in the centre bathroom was great and overall lovely hotel We didn t eat at the hotel but the food served looked nice

Unfortunately the mini bar wasn t working in my roomvery The use of the sauna and the bathrobes are not included in the price  I really liked the design of the hotel The room and the bathroom was clean and comfortable The staff was friendly they gave me tips what to check out in the city The gym is small but well equipped

Nothing great hotel if there was a tram stop straight outside it would be perfect  Bed was fantastic hotel were very accommodating travelled in a family of eight and we had asked for rooms all on the same floor which the hotel accommodated

N A  Hotel was what I expected wasn t too far from airport or to tram station Hotel was lovely clean and Sky Bar was a lovely way to end your evening Staff were very friendly helpful just gutted we didn t stay for longer so we could of experienced the pool spa

Better priced food in restaurant   Lovely room and location interesting incorporation of fashion in the lobby Helpful staff nice food Great sky bar

Cannot complain about anything   Stay in the hotel was fabulous Hotel is gorgeous and so clean Staff are extremely helpful and so polite It really makes all the difference Will be coming back to stay
No complaints  I liked everything about this hotel the clean spacious rooms excellent breakfast and heated pool The staff were also polite and friendly and the location is great Definitely returning

No shuttle bus to the airport and back as it costs a small fortune on taxis No breakfast included with room in a very nice hotel for the price it should be included   Service and friendly staff and the room was very classy

Having to leave Seriously there was nothing to not like it was the best trip ever  The service was amazing both room and staff stayed in a triple room it was amazing The restaurant food was great I had the most amazing risotto I cannot wait to go back The best time ever Having Booking com pick us up from the airport for free and take us to our hotel was a great touch thank u so much

We didn t get any slippers or a bath robe which I am used to getting even in hotels with less stars   The bath tub was great and the bed really was extra comfy

The aircon could have been a bit more powerful We had to leave it on for quite a long time to feel it but this was due to the size of the room   We loved the atmosphere and music in the sky bar The room was beautiful and the staff were happy to help with any queries
Location slightly out but tram takes 25 mins in to central Food and drinks very expensive  Great rooms perfect Very fresh rooms nice an warm lovely views Great entertainment at sky bar

Nothing   We had such a fab stay we enjoyed every minute of it and loved everything about the hotel Great location close to airport and the city We had drinks food and desserts and all were amazing Definitely would book again

The staff is not professional I opted for the spoil me package that was a huge dissapointment They state daily fruit and snacks while I actually got just a banana and 2 2x2cm brownies the first day and nothing the second The package also was supposed to include the late check out by 15h My card got blocked before 15 and I had to revisit the reception to get it working again This was not a problem for me but really shows that they are not in sync and have no idea who paid for the pavkage and who hasn t I had received the mineral water and shampoos only the first day and had to call the reception and ask for additional ones Even though the package said DAILY mineral water and toiletteries Then at about 14 15 even though i had the do not disturb sign on my door was in fact disturbed by the employee at the reception who said to me and I quote You know you have to check out I replied yes by 15 00 to what she said By 15 00 Okay No apologies nothing Not really on the level of a 4star hotel Finally I requested a company receipt on my email address in english First i got the normal invoice then i got the company one in dutch and had to double check it twice to arrive at the reception one last time and then I was told i cannot get it in english because i had already checked out My company has very strict rules regarding the receipts for the trips I take and without a propper one I would have to cover the expences by myself so this was a problem for me All in all I am very dissapointed by the service I received Would not stay here again not recommended The employees that were not helpful were mr Carol and trainees whose names i wont mention as they are still learning   new has a nice pool and sauna but had to pay extra for it 10 Good breakfast clean
staff was rude took 200 pound for a deposit which they said well have back date of check out they would not give it back made a formal complaint would never travel to this hotel again  bed was comfy

nothing great stay for me and my partner will definitely be staying here again  the hotel was spotless the tram was a five minute walk from the front door the staff were very friendly and helpful the sky bar was nice the room was spotless and maintained daily

Fire alarm went off one day at 4 30am There was no communication or a member of staff in site It was a false alarm and all we received was a piece of chocolate as an apology left in our room the following day

Nothing I did not like except a false fire alarm in the early hours It happens there was an apology Safe in the room did not work Getting into the city centre is straight forward tram 1 or 17 but you are a bit out of the way in a fairly non descript area   The room was comfortable and nicely decorated Checking in and out was straightforward The Skybar has a good view and pleasant ambience

The location of the hotel is just a little far if you are looking for a walk as there is nothing much to do near bye   We really enjoyed to hotels facilities like the swimming pool the bar the restaurant but mainly the sky bar on the top floor

Check in was smooth staff were polite and it was a speedy process We had a twin room and it is a lot smaller than the images portray but this wasn t a major problem we settled in easily and the views from the room were nice and calm Although overpriced the breakfast buffet was lovely there was a nice variety We figured it worked out cheaper and better than getting a taxi to a get breakfast as the hotel is isolated from everything not in central amsterdam The pool is small and the changing areas are awful no privacy no lockers and one tiny shower There unfortunately were children s swimming lessons going on during our stay so several of us including children boys and girls were cramped into the whole spa area The hotel should keep such events separate from when hotel guests can use the spa facilities Overall the stay was pleasant and the hotel served its purpose

The woman who worked in the sky bar refused my partner entry because of the shoes he was wearing This was embaressing as we were with friends and everyone else was allowed entry It was obvious we were guests at the hotel and my partner was wearing comfy SMART trainers as he has an ankle injury at the moment The woman upstairs was quite rude about this Also the pool area was nice however you had to be naked in order to use the sauna which we felt was rather odd It would be nice if you could order drinks to relax with besides the pool   The room was lovely and very clean The breakfast at the hotel was great and there was a lot of selection The coffee machine in our room was another great touch The location of the hotel was good and it was very easy to access public transport into the centre
location was slightly far from the city center considering location it was pricey hotel   Friendly staff facilities are new and modern comfortable rooms
Lovely hotel Great facilities Lovely pool Lovely staff Very clean very close to tram stop Not fat form the centre Great value for money It s the second time I ve stayed in this hotel

Bit far from heart of Amsterdam but 3 5 min walk will take you to the tram stop then it s only around 10 mins to city Room 643 was quiet smaller than the rest on the floor witch was a bit annoying to see other guests with a bigger room on the same floor also it was right beside the cleaners room witch was quiet loud at times when they opened and closed the door   Beds were very comfortable staff were friendly clean rooms free wifi and the food was nice showers was lovely

Ordered two rooms with 2 single beds they were there but every time the rooms were serviced they were pushed together to make one bed which defeated the purpose to me But that not a big deal at all easily dealt with   The hotel was very clean and well heated the staff were accommodating and very kind The rooms were sound proof too we didn t get complaints of load music like I thought we would have thankfully

The swimming pool is quite good but just to say something the lighting and the ceiling could be improved a bit   The room has got a nice modern design it was so cozy clean and confortable Really good bathroom with both bath and shower and a separate toilet Perfect for a trip to Amsterdam I would repeat no doubt There is a coffe machine and a kettle to have coffee or tea in the room itself Ironing facilities and even an umbrella just in case Perfect
Pool closed during one of our days which was disappointing   Rooms are beautiful beds are amazing big and comfortable Sky Bar is also relaxing and views are special
Friendly staff very clean and modern great sound prof as we was on the 10 floor next to the sky bar we could not here any noise Want to say a big thanks to taco he was great and gave stunning service

the Sky bar was dissapointing and unless you are a party of more than 2 siting at the window for the views seems to not be an option we were given seats in a dark cubicle opposite the bar and when a table came free at the window we asked could we move but told no as that was for table of 4 or more then to our supprise 3 people were then given the seat  bedroom good with excellence shower

The fact that there wasn t already slippers and a dressing gown in our room Instead we had request them Also our covers were not changed until our last day On the first night we requested for glasses and some water and those were the same glasses for the whole stay We was not very happy about that

Little bit far from everything but tram stop just up the road makes it easy to get around   Great hotel Lovely and clean and extremely safe Liked the fact that you could only get into the hotel after a certain time with your room key
The service was excellent and the room beyond our expectations This helped us giving an experience we shall remember for a long time even though we only stayed for a single night
Couldn t have a shower as it was blocked twice Had to get changed rooms as the one we requested wasn t available on the first night  Couldn t have a shower as it was blocked twice

I found it quite rude how a member allowed another guest to cut in front of me in line completely disregarding me and not apologising for it I only had a small query and this was very off putting I usually stay in 5 s for this reason The facilities are generally similar however the service is what makes the difference They also weren t very helpful with small requests I tried to explain I only needed a car parking ticket for one day of the stay on a number of occasions On check out I was charged for 2 days The bathroom wasn t clean on arrival The towels in the bathroom were very thin   The hotel itself was reasonably decorated The bathroom was nice The beds were comfortable and the sheets were very clean I didn t get chance to use the spa facilities which I usually do when travelling but they do have good opening hours

The hotel is a bit out of town and required a 15 minute tram ride into town the trams are very easy so not a massive problem Worth the travel for the hotel  Lovely hotel very pleased and would definitely stay again
The pool was out of use and no alternative of using any other pool in the whole of Amsterdam was offed Spa vouchers were given instead but only after we complaint   The room cleanliness breakfast

Thanks to the front desk team members very pleasant to see that they are always available for help Thanks to Anita from the bar where I was enjoying my breakfasts I recomend the mercure breakfast dish great to start the day

A few basic issues hairdryer is DREADFUL so if you have long hair or hair that needs styling it is close to useless so bring your own Also the design of the bathroom is strange it has a glass wall door so whilst i was in the shower we ordered room service but they couldn t come in as the walkway would have meant I was very exposed Such a silly design And the hairdryer being in the bathroom and attached to a unit means you cant use it if someone else is in the bathroom Plus the glass door is an accident waiting to happen I hope the hotel reads this Finally the staff lacklustre on check out i am not sure she even noticed i was there paying let alone wish me a pleasant day or ask how our stay was I did like the hotel honestly just a few gripes particularly around design faults and receptions service   Reception is impressive and has great facilities if you make use of them and its a short tram ride into the centre and just a short train ride from Airport Lovely big beds too It is a very modern looking hotel so perfect for young couples groups of friends or someone just loving a more creative environment Sky Bar is nice and great service and nice selection of cocktails

I was really disappointed that the price Booking com gave me differed from the actual costs even though we booked way in advanced their room prices change on a daily basis so we ended up paying way more   The staff was great and made an effort to make you feel like a valued guests

Value for money is not good at all You have to pay extra if you want to use the sauna and also it s a naked only sauna This was very disappointing   The food and design of the hotel was really nice and it s very clean

The hotel explains it had a pool and sauna but It doesn t state that you have to pay for the sauna Ten euro extra per person to use the sauna Also whilst we were there the pool was being used for children s swimming lessons So the changing room and pool was full of children I could hardly move and in the end I decided not to use the pool at all as it was impossible I had a massage in the spa which to be honest wasn t very good I am a trained beauty therapist myself and the therapist didn t seem like she knew what she was doing at all   Staff were helpful Room was clean

Far away when it rains from tram station Bathrobe and slippers are missing Toiletries are only for ONE person Bathroom s door is transparent so it is ONLY for couples Fortunately the basin is seperate WC   Absolutely recommended Clean excellent room service very nice restaurant good wine list and sef s course meal is a must Pool and other services are very good Also nice area is the SKYY Bar Only 10 min from the airport by taxi Perfect matress and cozy room

Noise issues with room just don t stay in a 01 room and then there should be no problems as all the other rooms are further away   Really great stay had a few issues with noise from our room and the wifi not being great due to the position of our room Frank the manager was so helpful in sorting out a solution he was great When I come back to Amsterdam will definitely stay again will not stay in the same room is all

The hotel offer a 45 offer to be upgraded robes late checkout etc and I feel this should be information offered at check in time Just a small piece of advice not a complaint at all   Beautiful hotel Clean all mod cons and lovely staff Tram stop 5 min walk away where they run into centre every 3 5 mins Takes about 10 20 mins to get to attractions Skybar at the top of the hotel is lovely and the view is amazing Cocktails good too We liked staying a little further out of the centre and this was perfect for us Would highly recommend this hotel
Bedroom was always clean and bed was so comfortable it was hard to leave Good location as 5 minutes form the tram which is 10 minutes to the centre of Amsterdam
They put one soup for hands and body We would like if they put one for shower and other for wash hands  The breakfast was excellent and the staff super friendly
There was no hair conditioner Only shampoo was provided Shower rob and slippers not provided Otherwise amazing place to stay the pool was awesome

I asked for a late check out but the staff didn t communicate very well and after 12 they came into the room and than called everything else was ok   clean good price 6 min away from the tram station wich left us right in the city centre

There wasn t much to dislike at all   Hotel was very mordern and querky In a good way The rooms were wonderful clean and the bed was huge I loved the sky bar which stays open fairly late that serves spirits cocktails and they also have a DJ playing music until close

The distance it was from the city centre also everything came at an extra cost You had to pay 10 per person just to use the sauna and steam room when really that should be inclusive of the whole price  The rooms were really spacious also the staff very attentive

nothing  perfect hotel for couples gorgeous hotel definitely one of the best i ve stayed in just a short tram away from central station where all the shops are best to buy a weekly tram pass if you re there for a few days only 20 swimming pool is also lovely aswell as the sky bar couldn t have had a better trip thank you so much westcord

The spoil me package that we have paid and the information about the Skyy bar reservation for the NYE The pool could be hotter   The warm pool the Skyy bar The huge bedroom

Staff not that friendly as we were there 5 nights no body asked if we were ok we were just another customer too corporate and you would never know it was Xmas not one thing was done  Bed

Guys I like your hotel and I wish to return next year However there are things that I wish if you could kindly look into Incident 1 None at the big reception at 8 PM and had to wait 10 minutes for check in The feedback was not received well and I felt like I shouldn t have told him so Remember other hotels have kiosk check in these days The check out was super quick and thank you Incident 2 Requested for a quite room far away from elevators and not near any frequent access areas and what I was allotted initially was a room next to the elevator and also next to a frequent access door which slams on every entry and exit I had to request for an alternate room and the second room was perfect Thanks for the gentleman for sorting it out but he could have read my comments from the online booking request Other hotels do read it out for me at the time of check in and they make sure I get something close to it Incident 3 I felt uninvited when the lady staff at the bar told me that she is unfortunately closed at 10 55 PM I thought the bar was open till 11 PM and all orders are honoured till 11 PM It s great if you could state that the kitchen closing time as a separate one However the gentleman at the reception was very friendly and helped me order a pizza that night Thank you Incident 4 One of the cleaning staff rejected my polite request to change my bed sheet stating that its not listed for change and she showed a lot of aggression when I asked her whom should I contact to get this done We all know when someone is angry However her fellow colleague another lady was kind enough to change the bed sheets and please convey my sincerest thanks for help time and help Thanks and all the best   Comfy room top notch mini bar nice view from room great mattress nice coffee maker and few committed staffs who made sure that all my little concerns are addressed with great satisfaction
Bit far out from centre but we knew that before we came and you could walk to Dam square in 30 minutes or tram very easily  Facilities comfort friendly staff

Upgrade cost for slippers and bathrobe they should be included like most European hotels   Very nice hotel with close proximity to the metro and train line Very good and varied breakfast and very friendly staff
Have to use a keycard to get lift to work quite annoying but i suppose its a good security feature   Room was very stylish and spotless Staff were friendly and helped when we asked for directions

nothing to report  Receptionists were very helpful could print boarding passes at no extra charge with easy access to p c lifts accessibility perfect stayed for 3 nights and then a further two on return to Amsterdam could leave luggage while we travelled to Brugge easy access by tram metro and train to city food was amazing dined in one night in restaurant food was out of this world lovely bottle of wine waitress was pleasant had a facial in the Spa was great

The staff were not helpful via checking in and out we had a few problems throughout the trip and the staff didn t want to help   The rooms are very nice the swimming pool area is lovely

My daughter and I were on a special holiday together so on arrival I chose the 45 upgrade which included a complimentary cocktail in the Skybat excellent lovely soft gowns and flip flops great for pool use and snacks water and lovely upgraded special products each day On 2 occasions I had to ring down and ask where they were as we d been forgotten Which made us feel a bit embarrassed On the second day of our stay we were out all day from 10am until 4pm we returned to find our room not serviced I had to go and find housekeeping to assist   Breakfast was wonderful substantial and catered for all choices Lovely swimming pool and health centre Staff very friendly and accommodating Location not too bad really Tram stop a 2 min walk from hotel 2 main trams no 1 and no 17 directly into the city centre in about 10 mins very regularly
no faults  I know the hotel from the wellness as I was a member for a year I didn t know the catering or rooms but they were just as up to scratch as the wellness

the prices were pretty high e g for food drinks considering it is a fair distance from the centre The language barrier was a bit of a problem at times especially on the reception desk which made things slightly harder work than they needed to be unfortunately it is not stated anywhere on your website about the dress code for the skyy lounge so when we couldn t get in because of the lack of formal wear it spoilt the stay a bit also had to repeatedly ask the reception staff 3 4 times for items to be put in our room that was missing   the hotel itself was extremely nice very clean staff helpful location and noise levels were good excellent bedrooms both space and facilities wise terrace bar is a lovely space and the option to use the spa area is great

Portion size vs cost of food in sky bar is not right Down stairs bar staff inattentive and not trained to same level as reception or sky bar staff It also closes much earlier which is a shame as it is a nice area for a quiet drink sky bar can be loud  Very comfortable bed great nights sleep Reception staff were excellent Very friendly Sky bar is open and serving food late

The service at lunchtime was a little slow and we had to wait a while for our food Once it came though it was great   We absolutely loved the hotel it was beautiful and in a great location The Skyy Bar is fantastic for an easy night out as well We would love to come back and celebrate New Year s Eve here one year Thank you so much Westcord Fashion Hotel
Was not much choice of food plus food was expensive for little portions Everything closed very early too   Hotel room was very nice Staff was very helpful
Can t think of something that I didn t like   The bed was super comfy staff were all friendly the room had plenty room and storage for anything you could bring with you

If you re a light sleeper probably ask to not have a room at the front of hotel passing trams can occasionally disturb The restaurant is a bit dark and having catwalk videos playing is a bit much at breakfast   Large selection breakfast foods and drinks Rapid table clearing keeps availability constant so no waiting even the busy hour of 8 9am Reception Bar very comfortable and great staff Walk in showers are very spacious airy light and have a refreshing ambiance Beds and bedding were very comfortable and felt luxurious Room air control was easy to use and kept room both warm and cool as required A brisk 20 min walk or 5 min taxi ride to Leidseplein makes this perfect location for quick in out of the city 5 min walk to the station for direct train to from Schiphol Very safe neighbourhood
The hotel was a little out of Amsterdam city centre however the tram was a short walk away and easy to navigate   Very friendly and helpful staff combined with great facilities and comfortable rooms

The only down side to this magnificent boutique hotel is the mean set of steps you might confront if you happen to walk from the train station as I did instead of hopping the tram The tram line and tram station a block away is on the same level as the lobby of the hotel If you walk from the train station as I did what a klutz you end up on a street at basement level with the hotel Climbing up the stairs with luggage is a pain Be smart get on the tram when you get off the train from the airport   The room was small but efficient and tastefully modern avante garde funk but stylishly so And it was clean Loved the glass door to the washroom Oh relax the toilet was in its own separate little room cloistered Japanese style with a solid opaque door The washroom also featured a picture window looking out over the main room and through the room s big picture window beyond Nice view of the International Fashion Center next door while showering if you are daring enough to leave the room drapes ajar Best thing about the room in my opinion other than the all important cleanliness was the coffee maker It brewed up descent coffee from little plastic packets for this admitted coffee snob Should I tell you about the TV with a lot of English language offerings and the free 24 sssshhhhhh 24 hour porn channel Maybe not Used the gym downstairs a couple of times Very well equipped for a hotel gym And it is clean Two TV screens in the gym provide diversion if your workout becomes tedious The free towel with your workout is a nice touch The main hotel restaurant is magnificent You haven t lived until you have had the veal croquettes served here with Dijon mustard Wash them down with draft Heineken on tap at the bar There is nothing better The location of the hotel is great It s one train stop from the Schipol Airport It s also on a main tram line so getting downtown is super easy and convenient The Dutch know how to do things right And just so you know this website lists me as being from the UK probably because that s where I booked the room from I m from Canada and am used to clean modern facilities This hotel fit those requirements completely

Me and my partner paid for a large double room but it didn t seem very big wasn t enough space to move around bed was a bit out the way from the centre of Amsterdam but was only a 10 minute tram journey be good if it was more centred All in all though it was still a great stay and would definitely recommend   The bed was really comfy bathroom glass door was very unique The staff were very friendly and helpful also felt very secure as only way you could get into building at night you needed your room card to scan in Me and my partner also loved the sky bar was open til 2am at the weekend which was good It was a fantastic stay and would definitely stay again

Nothing   Beds were comfortable Skyy bar is great Friendly staff We didn t have the hotel breakfast Only 5 mins walk to Surinameplein tram stop which takes you into the city 10 mins approx to Anne Frank haus

lacking in character no sandwich snack option for bar food just the full restaurant menu square pillows are not for everyone   very comfortable bed spacious room good breakfast quiet at night friendly staff

N A  Style comfort friendly walk to tram not too far as public transport system is excellent Ideal location to airport also Pool and gym were great Would recommend

Nice sized bedrooms kettle and coffee maker available safe all you would expect Enjoyed Sky bar as it was lively and good music Asked for all rooms to be close as a group of friends and this was accommodated Decided against breakfast and found a local cafe by Vondelpark

Be carreful in the swimming pool during swimming lessons at 5 30 pm the trainer allowed childrens to go in the water with street shoes and clothes   The very good breakfeast the cleanliness and silence of rooms Staff were very friendly and helpful The closeness of the public transportation

The mattress was harder than we are used to Needs directions from the main station if using public transport   The restaurant was very good We paid for a voucher for two breafasts and a 3 course dinner Breafasts provided a variety of food and the dinner was wonderful Staff were very obliging and helpful with tickets tours etc

Westcord fashion hotel was fantastic I chose to stay slightly out of the centre of Amsterdam and this meant we could afford a nicer hotel Three minutes takes you to Surinameplaine tram stop and the 1 or 17 tram takes you into the centre in about 20 minutes The trams run every 6 minutes which is great Buy the 24 48 72 96 hour travel cards from reception and get on or off any tram any time The 4 day card was only 21 50 Vondelpark is nearby and this is a lovely walk into the centre if you have an hour to spare The pool was lovely and our room was kept clean every day with all toiletries replaced daily Although we didn t eat in the hotel we did use the sky rooftop bar every night Service was great and although the cocktails are expensive enough at 12 they were lovely and the beer was a good price As it was my husband s 30th I let the hotel know and we arrived to our room to find a voucher for a complimentary cocktail each in the sky bar We really appreciated this The hotel also stored our baggage after check out until we were ready to go to the airport If we go back to Amsterdam and we probably will as we loved it we would definitely stay at westcord fashion hotel again
The manager knows don t need to tell anyone else   The manager Robbert is lovely we had a query and he just wanted to make our stay the best it could be Would stay there again

One thing two members of staff gave us wrong info about breakfast times we ended up missing it twice but that is the ONLY gripe  Lovely comfy bed extremely clean room loved the decor
