The last time we came they apparently outsourced their apple pie We found this out after visiting this time because the pie was NOT the same It was nowhere as good as the last and we were thoroughly disappointed at that   For the price I love this hotel which is why we stayed here for a second time It is in the perfect location to get to the train and you can also walk around and discover the neighborhood that is surrounding the hotel The hotel has a cool bar that has a good dj and the drinks are also amazing I cant think of a reason not to stay here They also have bikes for rental

A bit pricey for parking was told we would pay a discounted rate of 15 per night when we checked in and was charged 25 per night   Attentive and very kind staff Facilities were modern and pleasant Location was a very short walk to the tram
Small bed compared to CitizenM   Everything was Great Good breakfast friendly staff also good with children The pool is a plus Close to public transportation and the airport We ll be back

Almost no restaurant and kiosk around the hotel But you can buy water at reception and order room service with reasonable price range   Room is big and comfortable We can easily access the train station by walk Good restaurant and staff Small park is available nearby and it s also good for small children Train ticket is also available at the reception

the pool was a rather cloudy which was offputting   Service was excellent staff very friendly and helpful Made the effort to be friendly even though the hotel is large and has a quick throughput of guests The food was excellent one of the best dinners we had while in Amsterdam and we had several Breakfast choice was very good also a wide choice and mainly healthy options

The music in the sky bar needs more variation than dance remix all the time as a variety of ages were in the bar OK on a dj night fair enough but not every night  The cleanliness quietness shower bathroom size of rooms

Really clean and modern hotel Short walk to vondel park but it s a fair walk about an hour into the city Centre but it s very easy to hire bikes from the hotel or get a tram into the city centre Overall had a great stay and would stay again

There was a not so nice smell in the halls Parking was horrible over there since they crack cars in that area all the time So you are kind of forced to take their parking space   Very nice staff Especially at the bar Also a good choice of wine

Directions to the hotel to be included From the airport take the train to Leylaan Take tram 1 or 17 direction Centrum second stop as you pass the hotel on your right Walk back 5 minutes arrive   Dining in the evening is Michelin standard You may only need one course If you are a big eater it may be pricy Visit the Sky bar for a cocktail and enjoy the view

See through doors and windows in the bath room this was a problem as we traveled with our daughter   Sky bar was great for a afternoon drink Easy ride into town with the tram systems They provide a great breakfast

When we arrived our bathroom had a large puddle of urine e Reported it immediately and they waited until the next morning after another phone call before they cleaned it No compensation was offered We also were charged 3 times and had to call from another country to report this Two days later and it hasn t been fixed Over 1 000 in charges that we do not owe They said it would be fixed but to this date it had not reached or account   The hotel as a whole was very nice
Not in the City centre but wasn t really too much of a problem  Very friendly staff lovely decor very clean beds were so comfy all around pleased

far too soft mattress door lock makes noise everytime someone is closing his door so quite noisy and you could hear everything the neighbours said bike rental expensive  free coffee in the morning when you dont take breakfast friendly staff free umbrella on rainy days

It is a bit far from everything  Nice clean hotel with super comfy beds and spacious rooms the staff is always smiling and very attentive the breakfast is very nice and complete the rooms are super silent

The staff were really friendly and helpful throughout our stay which was great and made us feel at ease The breakfast buffet was really nice they had loads of different foods and was very fresh The hotel is only a few stops on the metro to the city centre and 2 stops from the hotel to the airport by train Overall this hotel is the perfect hotel for any stay they have everything you need and a great overall location to stay I would recommend to anyone
Bar on top floor was a good idea but could have done with a dance floor Wasn t too keen on being told where to sit by waiter  Bed comfy most staff friendly Clean and rooms very well soundproofed

That we can no smoke in the rooms is such a big turn off We pay so much money but are blocked off from our habbits   The bed was comfy nice design in the room bathroom was modern and stylish Had no complaints about the room at all
Parking difficult to impossible car park hotel expensive 25 Complimetary water at reception desk but not in the room  Nespresso machine in room Room size and decoration

The sauna wasn t free for guests which I thought was a bit unfair considering the priced payed   The bed was very comfortable and the rooms were cleaned even when we left later than usual and just left out the please clean sign on the door The hotel overall had a great atmosphere and was very clean throughout The Skyy bar was fabulous and the team stop was only a short walk away which brought you directly to the centre

Specifically checked about gluten free breakfast A Art from the bread the chef was unable to tell me whether any of the other food was gluten free I phoned before to check so this is disappointing   Price was good and included breakfast Close to tram
No smoking rooms  Excellent staff very friendly and helpful Room always clean We thought it was very kind to leave us bottles of water and snacks for free

mini bar vending machine didn t work for 2 nights the reception happily wrote off the charges for the goods we did not receive though  The room was amazing bed comfy and the room service food was unreal

not very clean asked for an early check in replied but didnt answer a question facilities worn down price for value one of the worst i seen lately shower could not be closed some drops all the time during the night as well   TV channels

Location isn t superb in that the hotel is 10 mins from the city center by public transport tram 1 or 17 But this is hardly an issue and it s something we knew when we booked   Very clean and modern rooms comfortable bathroom with separate toilet friendly staff very good breakfast

Went to the restaurant based on Trip Advisor recommendations and felt that the wait staff was rather snooty and not very friendly Also beds were quite hard and the pillows even though there were two different types were not very comfortable I booked this hotel because it had a pool and others did not We were looking forward to sitting by the pool while our children swam but were told we had to wait outside and could not enter without a swimsuit We did not return I also did not realize that I would be charged a different rate for each night we stayed and the price got progressively higher per night   Rooms were clean relatively large and well appointed Very nice shower and bath Great location outside of the craziness of the center but easy to get to all sights on the tram

One if the best ways to discover Amsterdam is via bikes The hotel offer very good bikes which include suspension and gears They charge a flat daily rate But I think that there should be an economy of scale therefore the rate reduced for hires longer than 24hrs I think this would be added value for customers   I have visited Amsterdam 3 times over the last 3 years and each time I have stayed at this hotel It is a little further out but the centre is accessible via tram or bike What I like about the hotel is that you get good value for money a spacious well designed room with good modern features Nespresso machine simple fridge plus a standard of hygiene that satisfies a clean freak like me The cleaning staff are very good as they do an excellent job of achieving a nice clean room It helps that the fixture and fittings are simple modern and of good design There are also some very good local shops and restaurants near the hotel on the South end of Vondelpark which are a 5 10 min walk from the hotel Visit Blauw which is an exceptional modern Indonesian restaurant

I m being a little bit picky but using chipped crockery for breakfast when providing room service in a hotel isn t ideal I didn t make a fuss about it just a little thing you wouldn t expect Breakfast a little bit pricey but as I say I m being picky   They had a very good selection for breakfast it was very nice All the staff we encountered were very pleasant and extremely helpful to us We were up to start traveling to Amsterdam from 3 15am requested before our arrival could we check in earlier instead of waiting until 3pm as this was their normal check in time We arrived at about 10am and they had our room ready so we could check in and rest straight away which was fantastic by them and really appreciated by us Hotel location is excecellent for public transport tram bus available into Amsterdam city centre 3 min walk away also for when we arrived from Schipol airport by train the train station beside hotel is 2 min by taxi or a very easy 8 10 minute walk Would I stay there again or recommend them Absolutely
Level of staffing in bar could have been better Waiter was trying very hard to attend to everyone   Quality of food in bar was very good Very comfortable room

It was a trip for my wife s birthday which I informed the hotel of They stated they would do something nice and didn t I was a bit disappointed by this   Lovely room very comfy bed Facilities were good We had a nice meal within the hotel The skyy bar is great lovely cocktails and very nice cool feel Location wasn t an issue Tram number 1 or 17 takes 15 minutes to centraal station The tram stop is a 3 minute walk from the hotel

The Sky Bar had good music but the cocktails were far too strong to enjoy and ridiculously overpriced 36 for 3   Great location for the tram only 5 minute walk and then 10 minutes on tram into centre There was a small glitch with the rooms on check in but the issue was resolved immediately and was allocated different rooms Beds huge and comfortable great walk in shower and bath Clean and comfy
No fridge in room There was a minibar vending machine but we couldn t put anything into it to keep it cold   Bed and pillow very comfortable Located near the tram stop
No minibar fridge only an automatic vending machine so no option to cool your own drinks A little far from the nearest tram station  Nice quiet room good parking easily accessible by car
pool area tiles especially not the most hygienic Dust in room cleaned daily so possibly came from AC unit   Close to public transport friendly staff Spacious room with good shower

I never used the pool really wished I had My fault entirely as we where too busy sightseeing   Excellent location 15 mins tram to Dam Square Would definitely stay here again it was far more luxurious than the 5 star hotels in Amsterdam Central Great value for money Breakfast could have fed a family

Couldn t fault this hotel  Great stay at this hotel in a quiet location away from the hustle bustle of the centre Easily accessible by tram with stop 5 10 minutes from hotel Another 5 10 mins walk to local bars restaurants We purchased a 48hr travel pass from reception which was great value for money Skyy bar was great for tapas cocktails Cocktails a bit pricey though Staff at skyy bar were excellent Great selection st breakfast although my daughter was a bit disappointed that the only yogurt selection was natural in a large bowl Our room was spacious comfy with plenty of amenities Would be nice to have a restaurant bar menu in room Would thoroughly recommend the West Cord Fashion

The bed was the most comfortable bed I have ever slept in It was a very spacious room The location is ideal 20 minutes from airport when using the train and then 8 minute walk to the tram to get to the centre which was only about a 15 minute journey We rented bikes for one day which was very cheap and cycled through Vondelpark We never had food at the hotel so can t comment on that

Only 1 tablet for dishwasher no teatowel no other detergent or washer for dishes had to buy our own Housekeeping said to be every second day however only came after our first night of five   New hotel with nice accommodating staff Tram stop in front of hotel

A bit far out from town Trams finish early so cabs home Cost about 20 25 euro which is a shame as trams are great value for money   Clean hotel with a buzz Good bar on the 10th floor good music reasonable drink prices Hotel offers everything you could want for

The location is just a bit far out Nearest Tram stop for the 1 or 17 is 500 yards then about 15 mins to Centraal Also nearest Cafe was 700 yards way from hotel as they charged 19 euro for brekkie Some staff in restaurant were not friendly and frequently had to ask for bill after waiting for ages   We stayed on 7th floor with view over the Rembrant Park Bed was huge and probably one of best I ve slept in Room had a Nespresso machine but you only got 3 pods and 3 milks per day seems weird for 2 people There was ice machine on our floor but no ice bucket supplied so you have to ask Food in restaurant was top class and can recommend the Chicken Satay and Tagliatelli with salmon not cheap but nowhere decent is Skyy bar was also very expensive most cocktails around 12 euros For breakfast go to Cafe Oslo which is fantastic also good for dinner this is nearest best cafe
nothing to complain  The Room was perfect very big and extremely clean Lovely Hotel situated only few minutes walk to tram stops in 5 minutes you can easily reach town center

Nothing bad to report   Stylish clean friendly hotel 5 7 mins walk from Tram Trams v regular Breakfast AMAZING Pool and gym compact but great Staff lovely efficient and helpful Cool skybar with seriously yummy cocktails and nibbles Train from airport 20ish mins 4 50 and 10 min walk or 15 mins in taxi 36
Didn t stay long enough to use the facilities It is away from everything else but was a perfect location to get to AWAKENINGS Festival   Can t wait to return

Buffet breakfast was great with a good variety Hotel room was lovely cosy and clean Easy access to the main city centre Great value for money Staff very friendly Good use of facilities swimming pool and sky bar

breakfast was a little pricey   the hotel was lovely very modern and staff couldn t have been more helpful Sky Bar was amazing and a wonderful place to have a drink and watch the sunset pool was a great addition after a long day touring the city

Nothing Liked everything about the hotel   The room were very spacious comfy beds great bathroom All very modern well decorated Facilities were great although out of town centre very easy to get the tram into town only 3 mins walk to nearest stop Really enjoyed our stay

We got a good deal on this hotel so we werent expecting too much well how surprised were we it was fab comfy clean lovely staff and 5 mins to tram stop straight in to centre definitely one the best hotel we ve stayed

Only thing I can say is that the cleaning staff came to clean whilst we were sleeping but we didn t realise we had a do not disturb sign on the back of the door that we should have put outside so I would suggest if you re a late sleeper like me you should definitely put that sign outside your room   The staff were really friendly from the moment we arrived We arrived with another couple so wanted to be on the same floor and they managed to arrange this for us which we was very grateful for The hotel itself is so beautiful Went for lunch at the restaurant on the terrace and the view was spectacular Our room was on the 8th floor which I appreciated as I love higher rooms and the room was nice and clean The bed was really comfortable and spacious Loved the bath shower room and the lighting in the room was good too so I was able to do my makeup without having to go in the bathroom This hotel has a lot to offer although it s not in the centre it s only two trains away so doesn t take long at all

we arrived at 16 00 o clock and our room was not ready yet I complained about that and the receptionist was really irritated and arrogant The room was ready about 30 min later The city centre was about 20min away by tram or taxi   The breakfast was good the room was spacious and the mattress convenient I liked the design of the hotel

Sheets did not get washed during our week long stay Price for an extra bed was more than the room itself Glass bathroom door and window through to the bedroom so you can see everything   Great location so easy to get into the city centre during the day and at night Bar on the top floor has great drinks with a view at night
The hotel was too far from the center though it wasn t too difficult to get there By trams 1 and 17 about 20 minutes   The rooms and the pool area were great
Price of the breakfast buffet we didn t use it as brakfast outsideof hotel was 1 2 the price  the comfort of the room relatively close access to tram good selection of restaurants in the area

The restaurant and drinks are more expensive than in the city centre which I did not appreciate especially when the hotel location is further out   I found the hotel lovely however location is a little further out therefore tram or taxis were required Overall the hotel was lovely and rooms nice a big
If you need to take a early train you have to take a taxi   Quiet but far away from city center close to bus station Easily to buy tickets and reserve taxi in the counter

It s a 10 15min walk either way to the train or tram station with luggage it can put off some of the sedimentary folk but the young won t mind   The hotel and rooms looked relatively new and clean staff were helpful and friendly nice quiet area all around good stay

Enjoyed everything My room was quiet nice and clean I have also appreciated the water boiler the Nespresso machine and the three coffee capsules and two tea bags per day Breakfast is of good quality and variety The swimming pool is about 12 meters long It is very good for a hotel pool if you like swimming a bit Water temperature was very good too The hotel is not in the centre This can be an advantage or a disadvantage depending on the case An advantage is that you are not in the middle of the main touristic routes with the associated chaos A disadvantage is that there are not many restaurants at walking distance beyond the hotel restaurant which is however not bad although selection is quite limited Anyway the restaurants available in the neighbourhood are not exclusively targeted to tourists and this is a pro for me Walking to the Damrak is about 40 min Tram stop to from the centre is about 5 min walking With a tram you can reach the Damrak in around 15 20 min The hotel is at 1Km so at walking distance from the Amsterdam Lelylaan train station which you can easily reach from to the Schiphol airport Journey from to the airport is very short around 10 min

Seems odd to have a toilet without a basin Going somewhere else to wash hands afterwards not right   Professional friendly staff Superb breakfast choice Very comfy bed Getting BBC on TV Safe in room Light and spacious room

Bottled water on arrival in the room would have been a bonus   Bed very comfortable shower and bathroom excellent liked the separate toilet Included ironing board iron lots of hangers safe free of charge Could purchase tram ticket at Reception Lots more on offer too

Convenient to tram which takes 10 minutes to centre tickets can be bought from the reception Quiet area in the evening for a good nights sleep Lovely terrace Reception very helpful Two relaxed bars with mature clientele Perfect for couples who want a relaxed chic atmosphere with good transport links to airport and town
Price  Peaceful and very comfortable beds exceptionally clean Very helpful staff excellent pool and very easy access for trams into centre of Amsterdam

The central air conditioning was not working properly so we found the rooms too warm for sleeping well   The location was great for us The tram nearby took us to the museum and downtown areas We enjoyed renting bikes and touring the area including the three parks nearby The hotel was clean and quiet and the decor was interesting The staff were helpful and friendly

No one told us there was swimming lessons in the pool but this didn t bother us so much as we only went for a quick dip   We was travelling for my partners birthday and we couldn t of been looked after any better with a room upgrade and complimentary cocktails as a gift as well as a immaculate room with a big big enough for 4 and a spotless bathroom Only 10 mins from Amsterdam central and 15 mins from the airport

The onsite Skyy Bar is listed as closing at 1AM but they refuse entry as early as 12 45 so just be prepared As a consequence of miscommunication we were surprised to be turned away   The aesthetic of this hotel is stunning It s truly gorgeous It s got a hip and trendy vibe that is sexy and mature It s really close to the tram which makes for a quick ride into the city center and it s only about 10 15 minutes by taxi from the airport so that s rather convenient They also prepared a take away breakfast for us because of our early flight which was really considerate
Food a bit pricey   Clean hotel Lovely staff Pool was nice room temp Bathroom really good Get off Tram 1 17 at Surinameplein quicker and easier walk to Hotel
It s a little far from everything with Big luggage especially in rain   The room is spacey with nice hot tub and comfy bed Close enough to take both train and tram without luggage

The restaurant menu was limited and staff weren t as attentive as they perhaps could have been when we ordered drinks to conclude our meal we didn t get them yet they were on our bill so we had to ask for them to be removed the staff in the evening in question were all young girls and seemed too interested in chatting to each other to bother with the diners That said there was a very nice trainee barman who did an excellent job with a professional yet approachable manner who didn t seem to be getting much training input from other staff I would commend this young man   Rooms were generously sized and appointed with ironing facilities and tea and coffee including a nespresso machine Main bed was huge and the single sofa bed was comfortable too On check in room wasn t ready cause we were early but the kind reception staff were more than helpful allowing us to put our cases in a secure cupboard The availability of spa and gym facilities as well as bike hire was very good and when asked the staff were helpful and knowledgeable about the local area and transportation

A bit far from the nearest tram station about 10min walk to go to downtown But if you want to enjoy the local neighborhood not only downtown then the location is good Shower room was glass paneled so if you are not couple a bit awkward  Very fashionable and clean Had dinner at the restaurant in the hotel and it was good except the spaghetti was too soft

It was a short honeymoon and the hotel as a gift placed an ice bucket with a bottle of fizz some fresh strawberry s and some chocolates in our room Just a really nice surprise for us Try the Sky Bar a lovely place to finish your evening

It was nothing which I didn t like about this hotel except for the fact that guests coming from the train station have to carry their luggage upto two levels for the main entrance Though they have a lift but no indication about the same   Swimming Pool was clean and good Beds were comfy Proper security well mannered staff and very helpful Outside the main city but tram no 1 takes you directly in the heart of city Very comfortable stay
The overall experience was amazing And I think we need to get ourselves one of them beds Comfy and massive The staff are friendly polite and always smiling

Big nice room I was traveling with friends really comfortable and spacious room for us was important to have access to downtown and to the airport If you like to walk a bit and to stay away from the beautiful but sometimes noisy downtown this is a great place for us was just perfect

Not enough time to use the Skybar and spa pool facilities so I cannot comment on these   Staff were helpful even providing extra coffee pods when we asked Good information about using the local transport The hotel felt spacious rooms corridors and reception areas

Only issue me and my partner had was the room was quite crammed and small even though there is a bed TV and two chairs would be nicer for a more spacious room but apart from that I wouldn t be able to criticise
minor little problems was swimming pool was not in use one day but cant be helped  room was pretty nice staff were friendly and helpful and tram location wasn t far

No bathrobe for use of pool Location 10 minutes walk with luggage 5 min w out luggage  Availability of Umbrellas Tea coffee nespresso BOTH Shower AND bath Pillows soft and less soft option Separate WC room Iron board
If you dont mind paying taxis the location is not problem But if you like to live in centrum It is rather far away   Room cleanliness and hotel style Price efficiency
This time we stayed in a room whose wall is just a board letting in coughing sound from next door during sleep We ended up sleepless for the final night

The room was a good size and very clean The shower and bath were amazing and the bed comfy The staff were very helpful and knowledgeable and the hotel had good transport links Close to Vondelpark and a pretty street of shops
Really lovely hotel Comfortable and clean Great that breakfast went on till 11am Also 12 00 checkout time was good Very helpful and friendly staff too We had a a great time in Amsterdam

The only thing I was disappointed at was the massage booking system  The hotel was well designed we booked the 3 course dinner 2 breakfasts a cocktail which was great value The only disappointment was 3 out if 4 of us booked a massage and confirmed the booking but not shown on the spa booking system

The hotel is a fair distance from the centre and was a 15 20 minute tram ride in each time but the trams are easy to use and good value for money with 12 24 72 and 96 hour passes   The hotel was beautiful clean and modern and very posh The staff were great very attentative and looked after us well and the hotel was very safe and secure with key card access for the lifts corridors and rooms The food was great and the sky bar on the 10th floor is a great place to drink in the evenings with djs on Friday and Saturday nights

Location was well out of the centre unfortunately not walkable Bathroom in rooms had a glass door and glass shower door which they do not tell ask you about So for a couple of friends sharing a room a little inappropriate   Clean friendly great breakfast and restaurant Bar and lounge areas smart and well designed

Location of hotel really poorly impacted our holiday The hotel is unexpectedly situated right on a motorway and while there are regular trams to the centre it was extremely difficult to navigate there are no English translations of tram stops making it extremely difficult to plan your journey It took us around 35 minutes to reach the centre via tram which was a bit disappointing The hotel isn t close to any of the tourist attractions the dam square musems vondelpark red light district and so on if I was to return again I would definitely benefit from a more central hotel Only good thing about the location is that it was 10 minutes from Schipol however even though this was a short ride in a taxi it was still over 40 Keep this in mind when booking a hotel  Hotel staff were lovely Spa treatments were amazing and the room was spacious and comfortable
Could be located nearer to the tram train stations but actually also ok   Staff really really nice people rooms facilities actually everything

Absolutely nothing other than we only stayed two nights and wish it was more   The staff were as friendly and as helpful as any staff in any hotel I have stayed in anywhere in the world The rooms were always spotless and the bathrooms were amazing Could not recommend the west cord hotel highly enough to anyone be it a business or pleasure traveller

Location far from city center 7 9min walk to tram 15min ride breakfast is rather basic   Bed was excellent room was spotless clean and there is Nespresso machine in the room which is nice Good atmosphere at public hotel spaces

The facilities were god but the one thing I thought was a little disappointing was that you have to pay for your sauna   Our stay was brilliant I couldn t fault the staff location or the hotel It really is worth staying here and we would definitely come back here to stay again
A little out of the center 10 minute walk to the tram station and a 10 minute tram ride away   Very luxurious hotel friendly staff clean excellent service

The hotel was not really near nice bars and restaurants as next to housing and motorway   Loved the friendly helpful staff and the hotel restaurant Tram stop nearby to take you into the centre of Amsterdam or taxi at about 30

It could have been better I could have stayed another week  The pillows were wieRd and uncomfortable besides that it was fantastic great food room service took about 10 mins location is absolutely perfect

Didn t mind ourselves but bathrooms have glass doors so you probably want to be well acquainted with your companion   Out of town location but with easy transport links to the centre of town and the airport Comfy rooms fun bar good breakfast

Would have been nice to have bottles of water in the room also very expensive for just a one nights stay especially when the hotel is not close to the centre   Super clean very friendly staff nice location away from the city with excellent transport links trams located approx 200m down the road hotel was beautiful and would have loved to have been able to stay longer
Charging extra for the sauna is a big turn off and wifi was rather slow which is very annoying in a business hotel   Great breakfast helpful staff nice pool

The bathroom was beautiful but it wasn t closed So it was a little bit embarassing because i was with a friend   I enjoyed the comfort of the room especially the bathroom it was very clean And the h tel wasn t far from the downtown it was convenient We really had a good trip

Room could have been slightly larger Duvets slightly wider   Very comfortable and appreciably cheaper than all the alternatives at that time Good value for money albeit in the expensive Dutch context Refreshing style and look to the hotel at last a bit of originality

Nothing really It is very easy to get to hotel on train from Schiphol they could put it on web site 4 euros and 10 minutes walk takes 20 minutes   Very comfortable well run and felt very relaxed Staff at reception very helpful excellent breakfast nice pool and sauna
The room was too hot as the air con did not seem to work great  The ambience was great the sky bar was quiet for a Saturday evening but overall pleasant stay

Just beware of the City Tax that has to be paid once you arrive at the hotel it s not a huge amount cost us 30 euro for the 3 nights but wasn t mentioned on the website   The hotel is fabulous inside and out from the outdoor terrace to the beautiful decor inside and amazing sky bar I couldn t fault the hotel or staff for anything I ll definitely be rebooking again soon
A little far from the city center but the good thing are overcoming the issue  Perfect hotel stuff extremly helpfull and nice willing to help with avery little request or need Clean comfprtable room
Bar service was a bit slow  Loved the room well appointed and comfortable Breakfast was lovely The nespresso machine in the room is an excellent touch

there were virtually no restaurants nearby more like a 10 15 minute walk   The room was comfortable with a great bathtub The food was good and the staff were very friendly and helpful The tram stop into town was not that far 5 10 minute walk

I was just so disappointed with this hotel I was expecting a night of a nice swim pamper in the bath room service in front of the TV and a big bed all to myself I m not sure why this hotel has such wonderful reviews For me it was rather impersonal a bit bling slightly dated style could have still been happy with this though if it wasn t for Pool was closed due to low level of chlorine so I couldn t swim during my stay double bed was actually two singles pushed together so it looked like a fabulous big king bed but actually I was falling down the middle no star fishing for me crud and a long hair in bottom of bed splats of milk coffee up the wall near coffee machine scratched and worn leather on desk chair lots of chips along edge of desk essentially nothing like what I expect a 4 hotel to be like After reading the above issues the front desk graciously wiped my bill   Lovely big bath great wifi responsive front desk staff nice coffee in the in room machine good TV channels comfy lounge seat in room room service was hot tasty and arrived when expected fab shower good storage good general comfort

Comfy beds and the choice to have a quiet room was met by the reception staff We only eat once in the bar area but the meal was good The location was perfect for us near to the trams and also to Schiphol airport Would return
The minibar is a vending machine lack of space to refrigerate products The swimming pool is not very attractive   Cleanliness comfort and fair price
At this hotel you get value for money Nice location close to Vondelpark and you can easily walk to the city center The hotel is clean the room are big high quality I would for sure stay here again
Loved the service the hotel and location The staff were so polite kind and generous The swimming pool the sauna and the massage service were also a great bonus

Do not be discouraged by the location since there are tram and metro stations near the hotel   The staff were very polite and the breakfast was huge and enjoyable The room was nice and we felt safe both in the hotel and the area around it

Very nice hotel but overall quite pricey compared to similar hotels centrally located Sauna access not in room rate included strange for a 4   Staff was friendly and helpful Very good food bit pricey good breakfast located close to tram stop to the city center The room was clean swimming pool available
We were on th 9th floor directly below the sky bar which you can hear bar is open late at weekends   Room was lovely and clean handy for airport and main tram line

Only came for a weekend so did not get a chance to try out the spa and some of the other facilities   We loved the sky bar and the rooms It was my boyfriends birthday so they kindly gave us two free cocktails in the sky bar which was lovely Plenty of choice at breakfast Staff all really friendly and helpful Short tram ride into the town about 15 minutes which is excellent if your looking for a quite

Breakfast very expensive so didn t go for this as there are so many cafes around The bar is very cool but there is very loud music so it s more like being in a club and not somewhere to go and unwind after a busy day of sightseeing so we did not stay for drinks in the end Location is out of town so once you are out of the hotel you cannot just pop back you need to be organised to be out all day However the area is quieter and more relaxing due to this The tram is a mere 10 min walk away so it s easy to get to the attractions   Room very big and comfortable Friendly staff and wifi very speedy Lovely selection of postcards in the lobby which reception posted for us There are rental bikes too

After returning to the bar one evening night we where told very bluntly that the bar was closed by one of the bar staff who I thought was very rude Just the night before we d spent a lot of money in the bar and had a nice time   Pool room etc
Very nice reception staff they were helpful and did more than I expected The lady at the reception made us very happy with her care and professional touch

Bathrooms could have had obscured glass not clear glass A small fridge would have been better for us than a unit containing drinks   Excellent service comfy rooms beautiful breakfast plus the attention to detail A lovely surprise of prosecco chocolates strawberries and flowers for our anniversary Well done Did not mind it being out of central Amsterdam lovely picturesque walks around the hotel
No jacuzzi but that would just be the icing on the cake  Amazing stay From breakfast to swimming to the design of the room will definietly be returning in the future The sky bar is unreal

Only thing I would say is the hotel s website could do with more detailed info on getting there from the airport We spent 35 on a taxi getting to the hotel to then discover it s only one stop on the train less than a 10min walk from a station only 4   Hotel was stunning spotlessly clean every member of staff we spoke to couldn t have been more friendly or helpful The barman in the Skyy Bar even drew us a map of where to find less touristy areas for dinner sorry didn t get his name but he had dark curlyish hair he is an asset to the hotel
Disliked the goldfish bowl bathroom Glass door and glass panel in the partition wall afforded no privacy  Light and airy hotel comfortable furnishing good food

It was our 30th wedding anniversary when arrived in our room we was met with roses chocolates champagne and strawberries what an excellent touch making our anniversary extra special room was also very modern clean and comfortable Enjoyed the skyybar and the quality of our meal in the restaurant on our last night was exceptional Would thoroughly recommend anyone to go to this hotel and wouldn t hesitate ourselves in going back

Location was a little far out however I don t think this would have bothered us as much if we had nicer weather   Fabulous hotel Staff were great in every area Not one staff member passed us by without smiling or saying hello Loved the modern decor in the room and the skybar and pool were fab would definitely recommend this hotel

Nothing  All staff were very friendly helpful and polite Breakfast was super a vast array of hot and cold food Dinner in the restaurant and lobby bar was great and varied and reasonably priced Beds very comfy Sheets changed every two days Very secure underground car park Five min walk to tram stop and ten min ride in to Centrum Very good value

The service in the bistro bar area was very slow on the Friday 29 April The waitress on duty that day was not very pro active at all   The decor and the breakfast buffet The Sky bar was fantastic and the meals and the service in the Restaurant were of high standards
The hotel is a bit far away from the downtown   The staff were very friendly and helpful They always welcome you with the smile that you expected The sky bar at the tenth floor has an amazing view

The mini bar was a vending machine in your room and there was only a very narrow refrigerated space for your own food Complimentry breakfast would have been appreciated The restaurant was too expensive   Comfortable beds quiet rooms we slept like babies Very clean and coffee was well stocked We appreciated that room keys were required to operate the lift and an entry door to the floors although it seemed the door on the opposite end of the hall was left open There was excellent lighting in the rooms and all materials were quality Also liked that it was away from the crowds of the city

The weather So many British visitors they must have brought their weather to Ams   Modern hotel located within walking distance from Lylelaan train station the second stop from Schiphol into town Only a 10 min tram ride from hotel to central Ams Helpful personnel good breakfast and an excellent restaurant My wife is allergic to gluten Ciliac this was the first restaurant ever to offer her ANY dish on the menu gluten free Good size heated pool

For those staying in the hotel I would have appreciated access to the sauna included with the pool facilities otherwise it was an extra 10 per person and there is no jacuzzi or hot tub As I stayed with a friend the see through bathroom was slightly awkward for us as there was a mirror opposite the shower too   Staff were very friendly and helpful The extended breakfast hour on weekends was great and the hotel had a very fresh smell
Staff very helpful friendly Just a short train ride from airport also short distance into city by tram Hotel very clean food delicious

nothing  Excellent location friendly staff and good food We paid extra for a spa package that included evening meal breakfast and spa access We expected the evening meal to be fairly std table d hote fair but it was more akin to a fine dining experience unexpected and great value Spa was great to relax after some long days sigtseeing Close enough to airport to use train to arrive and right on a tram stop to get into the city

The coffee machine in our room didn t work i notified reception 3 times and i was assured it had been fixed and to be fair it worked once but then it died again I couldn t be bothered asking for a fourth time to have it looked at especially as we were leaving the next morning I think 19 is overpriced for a breakfast be more reasonable   The rooms were lovely and comfortable although the clear door to the bathroom was a little off putting but at least the toilet wasn t in there The breakfast was really great loads to choose from and it was all replenished quickly The staff were always there to help and always with a friendly smile We would stay again

The only negative that can be said is that rooms are cleaned very slowly It has happened the cleaning staff come to clear room at 17 00 But generally our stay in the hotel was very nice   Excellent hotel not far from downtown Very nice breakfast but at peak hours is hard to find a seat The staff was very friendly and always ready to help
It s a transit hotel on the belt way not suitable for city travelers In general the quality corresponds to a lower hotel category   Great SKYY Bar

Was misinformed by a staff member where we could catch the bus to the airport so we could get the bus to Keukenhof I showed him the information we had We ended up wasting time going all the way to central station only to find the bus stop wasn t all that far from the hotel and we had to head back the way we came   Nice place to stay Trams 1 and 17 run quite often so it doesn t take too long to get into the city centre and the walk to Surinamplein isn t too long The interior of the hotel is quite nice and the room was very comfortable Wish I had had time to use the facilities

The stairs were steep and we couldn t use the lift before we checked in   The staff was very accommodating with us and our little one The location is very easily accessible from the airport Take a train from Schiphol to Lelyland Walk for 5 7 min The pool is included in the standard package
Bacon was a bit salty but everything else was brilliant   Modern facilities friendly and helpful staff Comfortable room modern wet room style bathroom modern decoration

Hotel is a little bit out of the city centre but tram service is efficient and takes one tram ride number 1 or 17 of about 15 minutes   Modern clean hotel with very good customer service Rooms are spacious with everything you need Bed is very comfy Sky bar is great to finish the night off I would stay here again

Minor issue glass door to bathroom and no hand basin in separate w c   We liked the style and d cor Room was comfy spacious with a reasonable outlook to central courtyard Food and service was also excellent Good location to walk in parks and explore museum district Access to centre by tram etc easy
The restourant might improove the men proposal that was to standard   Modern structure with a lot of inside services and easy to reach from airport and city
Far from city center transparent glass door of the bathroom is inappropriate  Comfortable room good breakfast with various options friendly staff nice decoration and modern furniture

service in restaurant could have been a little faster waited 45 mins for meal and it really wasn t busy waiting staff very pleasant tho   triple room fantastic and spacious very clean excellent pool and area staff were very helpful trams within 5 min walk and some cafes and restaurants too

We found the room a little too warm Perhaps the air conditioning was not operational at this early point in the year early April   The staff were very welcoming and helpful Our room was clean and well appointed It was especially helpful to have facilities for making coffee tea The Skyy Bar 10th floor was fun We had very good meals in the informal bar restaurant on two evenings and an absolutely splendid meal in the formal restaurant on our final evening Cannot emphasise enough just how high the standard of presentation and cuisine were in relation to the latter We would happily stay at the hotel again despite the fact that it is not in the centre of Amsterdam Using the trams numbers 1 and 17 and about as frequent as it is possible for a service to be became just part of the experience This hotel was far less expensive than those more centrally located but it proved to be as indicated above a choice we were most happy with

We were staying on the 7th floor which was too close to the skybar as the music was very loud and didn t stop until the early hours of the morning   The staff were very friendly and helpful The room was very clean

It s a bit expensive and lunch dinner menu doesn t offer much   The hotel is very close to the airport and easy accessible by car There s free access to a great indoor swimming pool and gym room The city center is only a 20 30 minutes tram ride tickets for the tram can be bought in the reception

There was one day where our room was not refreshed however this was sorted out quickly when we called the reception   A little out of the city centre but excellent tram links a 5 minute walk away The room was clean and spacious

The food in the bar was over priced and service was very slow Waited 45 minutes for dinner The waiter asked if we d like to see a dessert menu but never came back with it I went up to the bar to ask for it and was told to sit down that it would be brought down to us Our room was on the same floor as the sky bar and the music was very loud at night We went to the sky bar one night and the drinks were over priced The hotel is a 6 minute walk from the nearest tram into Amsterdam city Tram takes approx 15 mins to get into city   The room was excellent and very modern Ideal for a young couple
Love this hotel rooms are lovely and always kept clean The fact it has a swimming pool is great The Skyybar is lovely with nice views and great cocktails

Fantastic stay at this hotel 8 minute train journey from schipol airport 7 minute walk from arrival station Staff very polite and friendly Rooms extremely clean and comfortable king size bed Easy access into amsterdam centre Breakfast and skye bar amazing Wiuld definately recommend and stay here again

Slow bar staff breakfast a little expensive not much to walk to   5 mins walk from tram very helpful staff lovely outside area really comfy beds massive shower spacious and immaculately clean rooms Skyy bar was brilliant too Great hotel Would definitely stay again Breakfast was delicious If a little expensive

The room was spotless modern and quite large which was helpful since we were traveling with our granddaughter The staff was so accommodating We were able to get tickets and information which decreased our wait times We were near tram and train stops so we could easily get to the airport and city center quickly The WestCord Fashion Hotel was a great choice for us We would definitely stay there again

The Skyybar two floors above played loud disco music until 1 am on weekends and it boomed through the room The wireless was spotty   Loved the wonderful staff who treated me like a king The giant bathtub was great after a long day Two different thicknesses of pillows on each side of the bed so you could use the one or combination you like best

The Skyy bar a bit of a let down for us really it lacked atmosphere We didn t really like the cooked breakfast that much either but I m fussy with food Others seemed to enjoy though   The bed was very large and super comfy The location was great with a very short tram ride to the center Really well decorated throughout Would definitely book here again
there was not supply any bottle of water in the room   the hotel was nice clean with friendly staff good food and breakfast clean rooms Nesperesso coffee machine in the room nice design

Some staff were inexperienced and made big mistakes There were two versions of the dinner menu which confused everyone Breakfast was good but very very expensive The rest of the menu and drinks also highly priced but with the location you have no alternative except travelling into the City Room TV s were old and remote controls broken in 2 of 3 rooms I booked   The hotel was clean and the rooms well looked after Staff were mostly very helpful Rooms were modern well sized and with quality fittings

Very friendly and helpful staff Great breakfasts Quiet spacious corridors and rooms Very easy to get the train on from the airport to the hotel then walk or get a tram Residential area with a selection of restaurants near Vondelpark is within 10 minutes walk from the back of the Hotel Easy access by tram into town
Service in restaurant slow we had to wait a very long time for the food   Very good service very nice swimming pool very good food in the restaurant good location

Mini bar was slightly expensive but to be expected in a hotel so not a complaint really   Rooms were lovely bright quite spacious and nice decor especially in the shower bathroom Staff were brilliant very helpful with directions pointed out places to visit and eat always approachable and attentive
The food in the restaurant and on the room service menu was over priced and there wasn t a vast amount of options to choose from for vegetarians  The spa facilities was amazing

Nothing to say as prefect for us  I liked everything about the hotel I will Defo be back For some people it might be far out from amsterdam central but easy to get to by tram only 20 mins and trams are every 5 mins

The cost of breakfast was prohibitive with four of us for four mornings it adds up to quite a bit of spending money There are cheaper alternatives within walking distance or the city centre is just a short tram ride away   Travelling with two teenage children we booked two rooms which were across the corridor from each other Rooms were comfortable well appointed and quiet the pool and gym were a real addition and meant we could have some down time in between sightseeing etc The food was really good although we generally ate out The hotel has bicycles to hire a great way to get into the centre we cycled through the Vondelpark which was lovely early in the morning Our teenagers were very happy they thought it was cool and comfy the Wi Fi was fast too Great hotel super helpful staff we d definitely go back

Nothing really slightly strange getting used to the glass in the shower room but you get over it   The hotel was very modern with good facilities we had brought the wrong plug converters and they supplied us with some so as we could use our devices Free wifi with a good connection too Lovely bathrooms although if you re a new couple maybe not as the door is see through in the bath and shower private toilet however It is near to a motorway but the hotel is very soundproof Tram line within a two minute walk so easy access to the city quick 8 minutes into Dam Square Lovely location nice dining area and also a lovely warm comfy smoking area Beds were super comfy lots of room for clothes decent tv ice machine on every floor good coffee machine Really can t fault it this is our 5th time in Amsterdam we have also stayed in the Hilton here but this hotel was a lot better

The location isn t great lookswise it s basically on an industrial estate but it s one stop from the airport and 2 stops from the centre of Amsterdam so apart from the look of where it is it s a good location  Beautiful hotel Very stylish and the room was really nice and comfy and very spacious The staff let us check in when we arrived to drop our bags off which was 3 hours early The Skyy bar was great as well

More info re card payment Maybe put on website which cards are acceptable not acceptable for payment   Didn t have any meals at hotel as we ate out Hotel rooms were spot on no complaints very short distance from airport which is handy if you re in Amsterdam for a short stay

The hotel is not that close to the attractions or eating places but you can reach them in half an hour walk The bad surprise was that I could not find the sewing kit in the room and had to use one that I luckily had with me   Good hotel with solid facilities Fitness room is well equipped and definitely was once of the key reasons for the choice Staff was extremely friendly and helpful They provide good information on the way to get to the city and other useful information even in your own language Excellent easy internet connection

Location Far away from city centre But it s good if you want to go to RAI convention centre Keep in mind the metro station is 11 mins walking Breakfast varieties were very limited same thing everyday   Staff Interior design Cleaniness

Location was ideal short train journey from the airport and a tram stop a short walk away which takes you directly to centre Hotel extremely modern and clean Staff fantastic extremely informative on arrival Breakfast excellent Skyy bar was great cocktails amazing Wellness centre well worth a visit Beds amazing
couldnt connect my Sony video to tv   super quality bed and bathroom spot on Cleaning service friendly knowledgeable reception desk fantastic breakfast
Room was very cold There is not a proper heating system Room service is very bad Internet is really slow Toilet is very dirty You can see yellow marks on the toilet seat

We stayed with you last week and when we first arrived we found one particular staff of yours quite rude to us and made us feel quite uncomfortable he wasn t welcoming at all I don t know his name personally Although our bed was really big we found it very uncomfortable and wasn t able to get a good nights sleep whilst we were there   Me and my partner loved the sky bar it was one of our favourite parts of our stay the cocktails were lovely it was a good vibe Our bedroom was lovely very spacious with a lovely bathroom and good view as we were on the 9th floor It s a 10 minute tram ride into the central but that didn t bother us to much but some other may found it difficult

Just recently got back from a stay here in Amsterdam On arrival the staff were extremely nice and welcoming Having not paid a tremendous amount for two nights here my expectations weren t high however I was very pleasantly surprised The room was stunning decent size large bed and very clean The en suite bathroom was of a good size with a lovely bath and separate shower The coffee maker in the room was my best friend in the morning Would definitely stay here again couldn t have gotten a better hotel for the money we paid
4 nights wasn t long enough   Staff were polite very helpful spa facilities were amazing and the location was perfect for us The room was also top quality will definitely be staying here from now on
Location hotel is a little outside of downtown access is easy with public transportation thought Overpriced breakfast  The room we had a king size bed a shower and a bathtub

I thought that the menu for the restaurant could have a wider variety and if you want to eat the bar snacks like the stake in the restaurant then there could be an exception   the staff were really friendly and helpful and the rooms were always clean and fresh which made me feel really comfortable whilst I was staying here
The drinks in the sky bar were overpriced which meant we ended up not staying there very long despite the nice setting   Really helpful staff who made it really clear and easy for us to plan our days

A little far travelling back from the centre after being out all day and night  Room was lovely with great bathroom Skyybar was fab apart from drinks prices Very easy to get to from the airport Staff really friendly

There isn t actually anything we didn t like We just had a issue with the hotels procedure in making sure the right suitcase is given to the right guest when guests have left there luggage in hotels luggage room this issue has been discussed and resolved so we are happy with everything   The hotel stay was very nice the rooms are lovely and the bed is very comfy The fact this hotel has free wifi is a benefit too We enjoyed a night at the sky bar which also is lovely It s a short distance from town which Is nice as your not always in a busy environment Defiantly would stay again
Got charged extra Was explained that Saturday is a busy day Trash and dirty plates in the hallways Public on the boundary being rude to be around Typical party hotel that we didnt expect

ordered room service and other services and asked the cost on both and they don t mention the tax on top of the price until you pay when you leave just found this a bit cheeky Didn t like that you needed your room key to get access to the sauna and that the staff failed to mention this Being picky though everything else was very good And I would go back   Beds were very comfortable room was very nice staff very friendly and helpful I liked that you could buy tickets for activities at the front desk

The toilet wasn t in the same room as the bathroom No milk provided for cups of tea No robe provided unless you booked a sauna day   The bed was lovely and comfy for me and my partner Had 3 great nights of sleep The staff were lovely and the spa area was nice too Everything clean and up to standard
The hotel and the facilities were excellent It was very clean and the beds were really comfortable Having use of the swimming pool for free was great

The cost of food was a bit on the expensive side for what you are getting I got a glass of orange juice fresh and it cost 4 50  The beds were very comfortable staff very friendly tram stop into the centre only a few mins walk

The music from the sky bar was quite loud every night and continued into the early hours It didn t bother us too much but I imagine some people would find it disruptive The directions sent to us describing how to get to the hotel from the tram stop on our arrival weren t very good as we ended up in completely the wrong direction So something a bit less vague would have been helpful   Room was very modern and comfortable All staff were extremely friendly and helpful and went out of their way to accommodate you The Sky bar was great to relax and drinks reasonably priced The proximity to the tram stop made it really easy and cheap to get around just a 2 minute walk to get the tram and you can use it go all over the city If you purchase a 72 hour ticket for 17 euros from the hotel desk it covers you for a weekend
We had to put 100 euros deposit and it was not mentioned before on the reservation   The stuff was very helpful and nice during our stuff Room service is great
Couldnt connect with my hard drive to TV to watch my own films  Staff are extremely professional and facilities are amazing never expected such a high level of attention

Somebody looking for the outside has no idea how cool it is since its within a recent housing building More focus on Ambient music Didn t got to try the pool but that s our fault   The decoration and attention to detail is very well played Cost wise and given its a 4 hotel we ve found the pricing for food bar pretty affordable Helpfull staff always willing to help Cost Benefit is very good given how close it is to Amsterdam Center and the conditions provided

I thought I had paid for the local taxes as part of the booking com deal but had to pay on my arrival Is that down to me not understanding booking com or did the hotel charge me again   Pleasant staff Room very clean Items such as towels changed each day Good facilities

Everything was perfect   Staff were so lovely and attentive to all needs high class cocktail bar at top level overlooking Amsterdam beautiful pool and spa area too Very close to Central Amsterdam about 10min by tram which the hotel sells tickets for Ask for a room overlooking the park for an even better view They even gave us free late check out because we had very late flights thank you so much x

It was not possible to have privacy in the bathroom toilet becauseOur it had a see through glass door and there were a lot of mirrors in the room Also we were disappointed by the fact that our large double room apparently was somewhat smaller than most others The images for our room type show a larger room and the hotel website mentions that most of the bathrooms have a separate bath and shower as well as a separate toilet and ours did not   The room was really nice quiet and clean and the bed was very comfortable Perfect with a Nespresso machine in the room Although the hotel is not centrally located it is easy to get around with trams nr 1 and 17 which run frequently The hotel is easy to reach from the airport it only takes 7 minutes from Schiphol to Amsterdam Lelylaan station which is a ten minute walk from the hotel The wonderful Vondelpark is also very close

The beds were large and so was the room Great facilities at the hotel and in the room The staff are very helpful in booking tickets for canal trip also tram tickets There was 4 of us in total that stayed here for my mums 50th she was given a complimentary cocktail in the skyy bar which was amazing Best cocktail in Amsterdam Will miss the pistachio latte
Unjustified car park charge if 25 this should be 15 booked in advance or not Restaurant is expensive limited choice slow service but quality is good

The swimming pool changing room was too small for the number of people wanting to change at the time we were there There were not enough lockers and there was no dry area of floor to stand on to change   Good breakfast comfortable bed good sized room and bathroom had a bath and walk in shower

When eating in the restaurant we did tend to feel slightly out of place with the menu which seemed over the top We just headed to the bar and ordered food but for those acustom to fine dining it is an excellent restaurant   Loved the bar and restaurant and the hotel facilitied our every need Room service was excellent too

Lackluster pancakes at breakfast seem like ready made ones Strange unergonomic huge square pillows in the room The staff s outfits are pass and not very fashionable   Great visual impression Clean Functional Good WiFi Huge mirrors in the room
cleaners did not change the bedsheets or clean the toilet   everything about the hotel was great From the food to the rooms great location and we will definelty return

The skybar was soulless and expensive for what it offers  Staff was helpful enough to prepare the room for us to check in earlier than scheduled Room was spacious and comfy as well as cosy Enjoyed the swimming pool and spa

One member of staff was particularly snobby on check in  The Skyy bar on the tenth floor had a really nice atmosphere with a great selection of drinks at a reasonable price The Sauna rooms where also very nice and easy to get to
the service in the sky bar was poor but this was the only downfall   staff was all extremely nice and also received 2 free cocktails as it as my boyfriends birthday would 100 recommend

Nothing to complain about just wish it was abit closer to town centre But still only a tram ride away   We found the staff very friendly especially the bar staff on the 10th floor absolutely loved it up there The hotel itself was gorgeous lovely and clean and very modern Rooms were immaculate Would definately visit again
Only the weather ha ha   Excellent breakfast Friendly and helpful staff Some technical problems in our room were immediately fixed after we had reported the same

There was a problem with my room key card it kept on deactivating which ment I had to go to reception 3 4 times over our 4 day stay to fix it since i couldnt get into the room  Good location staff really friendly room was very clean and also the restaurant food was very nice

Only one thing that I was not keen on and that was that the bed was uncomfortable   The food in the hotel was amazing We ate there a couple of times as the food was that good The hotel was beautiful and clean and the staff were helpful
A little far from downtown but public transportation is very convenient  Very nice hotel good facilities big comfortable and clean room efficient personnel

I asked for Dental Kit and the reception said he couldn t send it to the room I had to self collect Called Room Service to no avail as well Location wasn t the best to access by public transport walk from Lelylaan station up the staircase with luggage from bottom of Westcord Fashion Hotel   Nice room Nespresso machine was a nice touch rooftop bar was nice

A 5 STAR HOTEL MUST HAVE A BELL BOY BUT THEY DON T HAVE AN THE NIGHT THAT WE ARRIVED WAS RAINING AND NOT ONLY WE TOOK THE LUGGAGE IN BUT WHEN WE CHECKED IN AND ASKED FOR BELLBOY THEY SAID WE DONT HAVE A BELL BOY THE CORRIDORS IN FRONT OF THE ROOM WAS GOT A VERRY DIRTY CORPET  THE HOTEL WAS GOOD FOR THE LOCATION
The distance from the hotel to Dam Square and other cultural landmarks and museums were quite far   Staff was great and accomodating Facilities was also good clealiness was tip top Wifi is stable

The bed was pretty hard but the pillows were super soft and so comftable the tram stop is like 5 7 min walk from the hotel then a good 15 mins into the centre but other than that it s a lovely hotel  Loved the sky bar with excellent view and a dj at night the lifts were super fast and that s always s good thing if your one of the top floors The rooms are lovely

Nothing bad to report only I d raise would be in relation to price of breakfast Was nice but expensive   Brilliant facilities modern and clean 5 min walk to tram stop which brings you into the city as well as being 7min train ride to airport Very good wifi Coffee machine in the room was a nice touch

Nothing awesome hotel  We wanted to avoid the city centre but also wanted easy access which was granted by the convenient tram station and railway station Incredible room Huge bed Great bathroom Breakfast was wonderful Staff were brilliant

One small thing the glass door to the bathroom Even though the glass is frosted you can see everything Very little privacy especially for a couple Would have been a perfect room apart from this Second thing was 20 per head per day for breakfast We didn t go for this option as we thought it was extortionate There are lots of lovely cafes close by which do great breakfast coffee for 10 check out Cafe Oslo   We loved this hotel It s really modern and clean and looks very stylish The staff were lovely and always very helpful You can buy your Tram and bus tickets at reception which is great and so cheap Less than 20 for four days unlimited travel Even though it may look like the hotel is quite far out of town it s only a five minute walk from a Tram stop Surinam Also it s one train stop Lelyan away from the airport which takes only 7 mins From there you take the tram to Surinam and it s a five min walk So easy Also we really liked this area it s close to Vondelpark and to the Museum Quarter so there are lots of nice places to explore Our room was really clean and comfy with a great bed And the shower was really powerful one of the best ever And the room price was really reasonable We would definitely come back

Management shoul pay attention to temprature of the food served in the breakfast hot corner Some of the item were cold in the center like eggs   Great amenities and stylish property due to the fashion theme You ll see many models or people in the fashion industry Breakfast was good with enough variety Nice pool as well

The minibar is pretty limited in terms of range and overpriced Room service has too many extra charges The hotel required a deposit of 35 for each dressing gown which was shocking Where the hotel is located the area hasn t got anything to offer but trams   The hotel decor is really nice Room service and reception are helpful in getting almost anything you need for your stay The rooms are laid out to look pretty plush and the artwork around the hotel is wonderful Food was at a good standard you could eat in at the hotel and have a great meal the wellness centre downstairs is wonderful I even forgot to bring shorts and they managed to sort me out with a pair for the pool The staff even surprised us with roses chocolates strawberries and prosecco in our room after letting them know the purpose of our visit was for our anniversary It was literally needed after the nightmare journey from London to Amsterdam Overall wonderful stay and would recommend
Noting Everything was better than expected   Absolutely everything The room was beautiful the food was great the staff were amazing One of the best hotels I have ever stayed at

There is a charge to use the sauna steam room at the pool felt this was unnecessary Location slightly further out than we would have preferred but we knew this upon booking   The staff were very friendly and helpful right from check in to check out Comfortable rooms very clean and we enjoyed having access to the pool and fitness suite Breakfast good variety and fairly good quality We visited Amsterdam with my brother and his wife to celebrate his 30th Birthday we were given a voucher for 4 free cocktails at Skyy Bar a nice gesture Very good food drinks at both lobby restaurant and Skyy Bar Location was out of the main city centre but tram stop very close by with 1 and 17 providing great access to lots of attractions Did not get a chance to use the bikes available for hire but they would be another good option for getting around Only a short drive from the airport Overall good value for money particularly since it was during New Year weekend First time staying in a Westcord would definitely stay again
Gorgeous hotel with great service from staff Excellent sky bar with fantastic views of Amsterdam Breakfast in hotel was excellent and lots choice to suit everyone

Husbands birthday weekend Added this to the notes on the booking and that it was a surprise weekend Thought it may at least have been mentioned maybe an upgrade or fruit in room or something anything Nope No mention Disappointed after such great views on here Wasn t made to feel special or unique just another guest   Location good Hotel clean and available on check in
Although there is a tram if travelling late at night it is slightly far from the main city   This hotel was very clean and had great facilities The staff were very friendly and nothing was too much
Uncomfortable beds and pillows to hot in the room and food was very expensive for average standard at best   good links to tram lines and very polite and helpful staff clean room with good decor

Breakfast far too pricey for what they offer Also the deposit they attempted to take off of me for tax and mini bar on arrival was 113 or something I only took about 200 so they tried taking half I didnt pay this as i do not use hotel mini bars  Room pool and staff

Nudist sauna haha You need to book spa treatments in Advance as was not a lot of availability left xx  Beautifull hotell was my anniversary weekend and I arrived in my room to find champagne on ice with roses chocolates and strawberries very comfy clean moden hotell Customer service outstanding lovely bar and terrace Tram stop just 5mims walk down the road and the tram was really cheap and really easy to get around I was very impressed thank you for the great weekend I will be staying here again xx

location is not central but tram stop is near by and by tram you can reach center of AMS in 10min  room was clean and comfortable we ve got a present from the hotel team as it was a special celebration day for us Thank you

Found that the food in the downstairs area was a lot more expensive than the food in the skybar   Beautiful hotel been here once before and came back it was so lovely addicted to the hot chocolates and the bed is huge loved the view from my room and skybar which also had lovely food was a lovely stay thankyou

The sore point is the staff which is a shame since apart from this the hotel is Amazing even though its far from central amsterdam Some of the staff are cold and not very welcoming the blonde girls at the reception are the worst of the lot it would be unfair to generalise Cleaning of rooms is not done everyday you have to specifically request for this and we were not informed of this u can imagine our surprise when we reached the hotel at night There was a technical problem with one of the rooms we were allocated reception asked us to go to sleep and they will look into the matter in the morning no seriously Unprofessional We had to make a scene for them to do something When you go at reception or call at reception for some info its as if you are bothering them they reply with such an exasperated tone that you dont want to go see them again   The hotel is located not far from the airport Schipol 15 mins by taxi 45 euros and a tram station 5 7 mins walking distance so its easy to get around The room is spacious beautiful and clean There is a heated swimming pool in the basement There is a heated smoking lounge outside The hotel provides additional services like sale of tram tickets tickets and reservation for various attractions which is a time saver Nice people from room service who attended to our requests promptly and with a smile
it was a little far out but i had a lovely walk through the park close to the tram so was no more than 20 mins from center   It was a good size room very comfortable
Didn t enjoy the single beds not what I expected from a large twin room and the pillows were not comfortable   Staff are friendly the room was nice in particular the shower

Much smaller bathroom than our first stay Charging for sauna use is a disappointment Pool and sauna too busy to use during stay Bike hire expensive for a hotel out of town Should be free or cheaper Coffee machine broken the whole time we were there 3 nights was not mended despite 2 separate requests   Excellent staff Super Sky Bar for cocktails pre dinner Beds are amazingly comfy best I ve been in Lovely area just be prepared to walk a bit or pay the tram card

We got a 9th floor room overlooking the garden Fantastic room Restaurant downstairs is fair priced great food Bit more information around travel would have been good But all the help we got was fantastic and we enjoyed our stay

nothing  The location is good train 1and 17 are not far from hotel and it could go to central station directly Very quiet comfortable and big enough room with an excellent bathroom The swimming pool are also very good

We booked a room for 3 people which should have been a triple room consisting of a double and single bed however it was a double and sofa bed with not even a mattress just sheets on a sofa A proper bed had to be added to the room Complimentary drinks and breakfast was provided to compensate The USB port did not work in the room and the staff were not aware of this utility This would have been very handy if was working Rooms were quite dark so not great for doing your make up  The hotel was very clean and having a lovely Sky bar was great The bar was gorgeous and had a vast selection of cocktails and drinks at a reasonable price It was my birthday and we also were given a complimentary cocktail Bathroom in the room was lovely and had an amazing large bath and a shower Alot of wardrobe and storage space in the room Was very very nice The hotel is extremely secure Swipe card is needed to get everywhere so this is reassuring Having a spa in the hotel was very nice and extremely clean however the facilities are NAKED for the sauna and steam so no swimwear Room facilities such as nespresso machine is great and also the mini vending machines in the hotel were really good Iron and ironing board etc where great Brunch in the hotel is amazing and had the best coffee ever at the reception bar Staff were all very friendly and helpful No problems were the service at all

My wife got very sick and we were not able to get a refund to go home and get her to the doctor it s very difficult to get medicine in Amsterdam   Hotel rooms were beautiful and spacious staff were very professional

We had twin beds in the room pushed together and they even had seperate quilts not great for a couple on a romantic break together Would have much preferred a double bed Odd that the rooms are obviously set up for couples as the bathroom has a window in and you can see each other in the shower but your given seperate beds   The staff were really great went out of their way to help us and were really friendly The rooms were very stylish

Really friendly helpful staff Excellent rooms Located away from the congested centre next to tramline and cycle lane and close to railway station
